letters.label: Letter One
variants:
My name is Pip. I am eight.

I am on a train I dont know. The seats smell like Grandmas coat.

A rat gave me this paper. A real rat. With clothes.

I am looking for Mum.

A little bit scared. Only a little bit.

Pip

I fell asleep on a train with Mum. I woke up and Mum was gone.

The train is different now. My bag is different. The orange book is not in it.

A rat gave me this paper. He had a vest.

I am going to find Mum. There are so many carriages.

I am not crying.

Pip

letters.label: Letter Two
variants:
I asked a man where the conductor is.

He had a yellow coat. He laughed. He said sweetheart there is no conductor. He said the train does not stop.

I dont believe him. Trains stop.

The man in the yellow coat sleeps a lot now. I think he is sad.

I am not going to be like that.

Pip

I found a notebook under a seat.

Someone counted the carriages. They got to 384 and stopped. They said there is no point looking for the front.

I dont know what they meant. Trains have a front.

I am keeping the notebook. It is like having someone to talk to.

They sounded tired. I am not tired yet.

Pip

letters.label: Letter Three
variants:
Some of the people on the train are pretend.

They look real. But they dont see you. I waved at a lady and she walked right past me.

Some people ARE there. The man in the yellow coat. The rat. A lady who gave me an apple.

I am keeping a list of the real people. There are four. I am probably one too.

Pip

I made a plan.

Walk one way. Dont turn around. Then I would be at the back of the train.

I walked a long time. Forty seven carriages. I did not look back.

There was no back. The end looked like where I started. Same Grandma smell.

I dont understand. I want Mum.

Pip

letters.label: Letter Four
variants:
The lady with the apple is my friend now. Her name is Soren.

She has been on the train a long long time. She wont say how long.

Soren asked about Mum. I told her. She got quiet. Then she said your Mum sounds wonderful.

She said it the same way the man in the yellow coat said the train doesnt stop.

I am still going to find Mum.

Pip

There is a slime in my carriage. I named her Pebble.

She is small and green. Soren said she is too small to be dangerous yet. I dont believe that about Pebble.

She follows me to the door but doesnt go through. I think she thinks the door is a wall.

Mum would say a slime is a monster. Mum is wrong about Pebble.

I miss Mum.

But I have Pebble.

Pip

letters.label: Letter Five
variants:
Soren told me about the door.

She said there is a door on the train that goes outside. She said if I find it I should go through it.

I thought about it for a long time. About Mum. About Pebble.

If Mum is on this train I have to keep looking. If she isnt I cant reach her anyway.

When I find the door I am going to sit next to it. And wait.

Soren said okay sweetheart. Like she meant it this time.

Pip
